nws_periods.name: Today
nws_periods.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 4pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_periods.name: Tonight
nws_periods.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 4am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 65. Southeast wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_periods.name: Sunday
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 10am, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 78. South wind 10 to 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
